failure_modes.cause: BPR set to 5.0 bar, but required is 5943.0 bar
Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Prolonged exposure to 120°C may degrade PFA
failure_modes.mitigation: Conduct regular inspections and replace PFA components as needed

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR with incremental pressure increase to 5943.0 bar to ensure reliability
Conduct thermal cycling test on PFA components at 120°C for 100 hours
